sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92209" key="r(afani/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥᾰφᾰν-ίδῐον</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑδ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥαφανίς</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:171" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">171</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
